howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our rigorous, transparent methodology ensures every assessment meets the highest standards of independence and accuracy.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We continuously monitor the European market for AI systems used in enterprise environments, identifying and cataloguing new entrants and updates.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Each system is classified according to the EU AI Act risk tiers and mapped against applicable industry-specific regulations.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Independent analysts evaluate each system against multiple regulatory frameworks using our standardised assessment methodology.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Compliance scores are published with full methodology transparency, including detailed breakdowns and evidence references.

evidenceBanner.title: Preview — evidence sources under verification
evidenceBanner.body: Claims on this page are being re-verified against each vendor's trust centre, DPA, sub-processor list, and certification registries. Every claim will carry a source link and verification date once the backfill is complete. If you rely on this data for a procurement decision today, verify independently against the vendor's source documents.

assessment.disclaimerText: This assessment is based on publicly available information as of the last review date. Scores reflect what can be verified from vendor documentation, trust centers, and public certifications. For a verified assessment tailored to your specific use case, contact us for a tailored assessment.

footer.tagline: The comprehensive platform for tracking, analyzing, and understanding AI systems operating within the European Union regulatory framework.
footer.aiTransparencyBody: This platform uses AI (Anthropic Claude) for its chatbot assistant and comparison tool. AI-generated responses are grounded in our assessed database and clearly labelled. No personal data is used for AI model training. All AI features comply with the EU AI Act transparency obligations (Article 50) and GDPR requirements for automated processing.
footer.copyright: © 2026 AI Compass EU. All rights reserved.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: AI Compass EU provides information for educational and professional purposes. Our assessments are based on publicly available information and should not be considered legal advice. Consult qualified legal professionals for specific compliance requirements.

cookies.message: We use {strong}essential cookies only{strongEnd} (session management, rate limiting). No tracking, no advertising cookies. Our analytics are cookie-free.

system.claimCount: {count} {claims} · every value below links to the original source and the date we verified it
system.complianceScoresSubtitle: Each framework is assessed independently. Click to see the detailed breakdown.
system.disclaimerText: Based on publicly available information as of the last review. Scores reflect what can be verified from vendor documentation, trust centers, and public certifications. For a verified assessment tailored to your use case,

methodology.heroSubtitle: Every rating on AI Compass EU is built on a transparent, evidence-based methodology. Our 8 assessment dimensions cover the full spectrum of European AI compliance requirements.
methodology.processSubtitle: A rigorous, multi-step process ensures consistency, accuracy, and fairness across all assessments.
methodology.dimensionsSubtitle: Each AI system is evaluated across 8 weighted dimensions, with specific criteria and evidence requirements for every score.
methodology.gradingSubtitle: Each dimension receives a letter grade from A+ (exemplary) to D (non-compliant), weighted and aggregated into an overall score. All ratings include source references.

step.evidenceCollectionDesc: We gather public documentation, vendor disclosures, certifications, and independent audit reports for each AI system.
step.expertAssessmentDesc: Domain experts evaluate each dimension using standardized rubrics with defined scoring criteria and evidence requirements.
step.peerReviewDesc: A second assessor independently reviews the scoring, and any disagreements are resolved through structured deliberation.
step.scoreCalculationDesc: Weighted dimension scores are aggregated into an overall compliance score on a 0-100 scale, with confidence indicators.
step.continuousUpdatesDesc: Scores are re-evaluated when regulations change, vendors update their practices, or new evidence becomes available.

about.heroSubtitle: AI Compass EU is the independent, vendor-neutral platform that helps European organizations understand, evaluate, and deploy AI systems in compliance with EU regulations.
about.missionP1: The European AI landscape is evolving rapidly. With the EU AI Act in force and a growing patchwork of sector-specific regulations, organizations face unprecedented complexity in choosing and deploying AI systems responsibly.
about.missionP2: AI Compass EU was founded to bring clarity to this complexity. We provide independent compliance intelligence — transparent ratings, regulatory analysis, and practical guidance — so that decision-makers can act with confidence.
about.value1Desc: We accept no sponsorship, advertising, or vendor payments that could influence our ratings. Our revenue comes solely from subscriptions.
about.value2Desc: Every score we publish can be traced to verifiable evidence. Our methodology is fully documented and open to scrutiny.
about.value3Desc: Built in Europe, for Europe. We understand the regulatory landscape, cultural nuances, and multilingual requirements of the EU market.
about.value4Desc: Assessments are conducted by domain experts using standardized rubrics, not automated scraping or self-reported vendor claims.
about.contactText: AI Compass EU is an independent project built in Europe for European decision-makers. For questions, partnership enquiries, or press requests, contact us at {email}.
